_meta.what: CLASSIC ARENA tier bonuses — account-wide percentage bonuses unlocked by reaching Arena tiers (medal count).
_meta.source: Plarium in-game Classic Arena tier screen, supplied by Mike 2026-07-21. VERBATIM Tier-1 factual game data.
_meta.scope: ACCOUNT-WIDE — applies to every champion, not per-affinity (that is Great Hall) and not per-faction (that is Faction Guardians).
_meta.CRITICAL: ARENA GRANTS ONLY HP / ATK / DEF. It grants NO ACC, NO RES, NO SPD and NO C.DMG. This is the single most important fact in this file — see below.
_meta.why_it_matters: ⚠ It closes the account-level ACC question. `estimate-stats.js: applyAccountBonus()` adds FLAT ACC +40 / RES +30 (good) or +20/+15 (fair) to every champion, described as the 'Great Hall + Arena bundle'. Adding up what those two systems ACTUALLY grant: Arena = 0 ACC, 0 RES. Great Hall = a PERCENTAGE of base, and 604 of our 944 champions have base_acc = 0 (non-zero avg 14), so +20% is worth ~0-3 ACC and ~+7 RES. The third account-level system, Faction Guardians, DOES grant flat ACC (+7/+15/+30 by rarity) but is unassigned on all 7 synced accounts. So the real account-level ACC on this corpus is ~0-3, and we inject 20-40. That is PHANTOM ACC on every champion, on the stat CLAUDE.md says gates content (Spider floor = stage x 10, so +40 ACC is ~4 stages of phantom headroom).
_meta.modelling_note: Needs the player's Arena TIER, which Gestal does not export. Shape matters more than the number: percentage-of-base on HP/ATK/DEF ONLY.
_meta.CONFIRMED_LIVE_2026_07_21: Arena panel on Mike's account: 981 Arena Points, Bronze I, CHAMPION BONUSES HP +1% / ATK +1% / DEF +1%. Confirms both the tier table and that Arena grants NO ACC/RES/SPD/C.DMG.

observed.note: The 'You' marker in the supplied screenshot sat at 981 medals — i.e. Bronze I, granting +1% HP/ATK/DEF. Which account this was is unrecorded; do not assume it applies to all 7.

unverified: Whether tiers above Platinum exist (the screenshot ends at 3,617 medals).
Whether the bonus is the tier's value only, or cumulative across tiers (assumed: the CURRENT tier's value only, since each tier states a full percentage).

Whether Arena bonuses apply in PvE content or Arena only. Assumed all battles, consistent with Great Hall/Guardians being described as 'active in every battle' — VERIFY, this materially changes whether it belongs in the dungeon model at all.
